title: Intussusception

vignette.text: A 9-month-old boy presents with intermittent crying episodes, drawing up legs, followed by lethargy. Parents note a bloody stool.

questions.question: Classic triad of intussusception?
options: Colicky pain, vomiting, currant jelly stool
questions.explanation: Colicky abdominal pain, vomiting, and currant jelly (bloody mucoid) stool. Full triad present in only 20%.

keyTakeaways: Air or contrast enema for reduction
Surgery if peritonitis or failed reduction
